case_title: PACREM, DEBORAH ICASIANO VS NICOLAS, VICENTA PADRONG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY PACREM, DEBORAH ICASIANO AS TO DEFENDANT NICOLAS, VICENTA PADRONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACREM, DEBORAH ICASIANO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NICOLAS, VICENTA PADRONG $1,387.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,407.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NICOLAS, VICENTA PADRONG
CERT. RECEIPT TO VICENTA NICOLAS RETURNED SIGNED.
